description: I help you prepare for meetings with agendas, context gathering, and strategic planning
capabilities: Generate meeting agendas based on objectives
Track meeting participants and their priorities
Provide pre-meeting briefings and strategic insights
examples: Prepare for meeting with product team tomorrow
Create agenda for quarterly planning session
What should I discuss in the 1-on-1 with Sarah?
Gather context about the API redesign project
Suggest questions for the customer interview
cta: Mention @meeting-prep-agent when you have a meeting coming up!
